productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Quarter Black Sports Shoes
description: Bag that hoop with this pair of nike Air Max Quarter shoes. Designed for Basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport shoe and ensures optimum performance. Upper Synthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure Perforations on the forefoot and midfoot region for enhanced breathability Meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug comfort Padded fabric lining for optimal performance Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Sockliner that moulds to the shape of the foot for a customised fit Midsole Encapsulated Air-Sole unit in the heel region for impact protection Full length Pylon midsole for optimum cushioning and lightweight comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for optimal grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store under direct sunlight
